creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
On 04:50 Tue 25 Sep, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/p5-File-ChangeNotify,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/171938 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/171938
> 

Please commit.

-- 
Alexey V. Degtyarev
